source_failure.first_structural_gap: The bridge-divergence proof treats a free index nu as if it were symmetrically contracted, so the antisymmetry cancellation does not establish nabla^mu C^bridge_{mu nu} = 0.
source_failure.secondary_gap: The weak-field Omega00 computation changes from +A_flat^2/(4 r^2) to -A_flat^2/(2 r^2) without a derived sign and factor theorem.

completed_conditional_reduction.name: SIDFHGravityRecoveryConditional
completed_conditional_reduction.statement: GravityRecovery follows only from ConservedSIDFHSource, Omega00WeakFieldAsymptotic, FarFieldEquationBalance, NewtonianRecovery, LensingCompatibility, PerturbativeStability, and BoundaryMatching.

assumptions: the weak-field far-field balance implies partial_r Phi ~ beta_SIDFH c^2 A_flat^2/(4 r)
circular-orbit law v^2(r) = r partial_r Phi

ranked_remaining_math.name: BridgeDivergenceCompatibility
ranked_remaining_math.needed_statement: nabla^mu C^bridge_{mu nu} = 0, or nabla^mu K^shadow_{mu nu} + nabla^mu C^bridge_{mu nu} = 0

ranked_remaining_math.name: ExtrinsicDivergenceLift
ranked_remaining_math.needed_statement: D^mu K_{mu nu} = 0 implies the required spacetime-divergence statement under explicit embedding hypotheses

ranked_remaining_math.name: ShadowStressSingleDefinition
ranked_remaining_math.needed_statement: the baryonic projection definition of T_shadow equals the curvature-dressed scalar expression, or one is demoted to calibration

ranked_remaining_math.name: ChiWellDefined
ranked_remaining_math.needed_statement: T_shadow != 0 for chi_SIDFH = A_flat^2/(2 ell_Chronos^2 T_shadow)

ranked_remaining_math.name: Omega00WeakFieldAsymptotic
ranked_remaining_math.needed_statement: Omega00(r) ~ -A_flat^2/(2 r^2) with sign and factor derived

ranked_remaining_math.name: FarFieldEquationBalance
ranked_remaining_math.needed_statement: the retained leading-order weak-field equation balances the nonzero r^-2 SIDFH term

ranked_remaining_math.name: NewtonianRecovery
ranked_remaining_math.needed_statement: the theory reduces to ordinary Newtonian gravity in the appropriate limit

ranked_remaining_math.name: LensingCompatibility
ranked_remaining_math.needed_statement: the same source that yields flat rotation curves also yields compatible lensing

ranked_remaining_math.name: PerturbativeStabilityAndBoundaryMatching
ranked_remaining_math.needed_statement: sigma perturbations are stable and baryonic-shadow boundary matching is well posed

next_bounded_improvement: Add ConservedSIDFHSource as an explicit invariant or replace C^bridge with a tensor whose divergence-free property is proved.
